name: Bespoke Code Optimization
effect_text: Pick one Verb and one Subject; those utilities occupy no Memory and one instance of that Verb-Subject program doesn't count against CPU burden. Costs 20% of the deck's base cost.

name: Buffer Circuits
effect_text: Add 5 points to the deck's Shielding rating. Costs 20% of the deck's base cost.

name: CPU Overclocking
effect_text: Add 1 to the deck's CPU rating. Costs 30% of the deck's base cost.

name: Memory Expansion
effect_text: Add 4 units of Memory to the deck. Costs 20% of the deck's base cost.

name: Polymorphic Intrusion Algorithms
effect_text: Add 1 to Bonus Access but subtract 1 from the CPU rating. Costs 10% of the deck's base cost.

name: Skeletal Case
effect_text: Decrease Encumbrance by 1, but Memory suffers a -2 penalty. Costs 10% of the deck's base cost.

name: Thermal Exhaust Case
effect_text: Increase Encumbrance by 1, but the CPU value increases by 1 as well. Costs 30% of the deck's base cost.
